description: Asset orchestration pipeline -- coordinates TTS call (Chatterbox TTS for narration audio), image retrieval with semantic caching (OBJ-054), background removal routing (OBJ-052), and assembly of all manifest inputs (images, audio, manifest JSON) into the structure depthkit expects. This is the glue between manifest generation, asset generation, and rendering. Per Appendix A steps 2-4.
notes: Tier 4 integration. Medium priority. Split from original OBJ-055. The full pipeline orchestrator.
